ol.li: Ownership: A buffer addr must exist in exactly one ring or the App/NIC processing state.
Hugepages: UMEM is pinned via mlockall or Hugepages; prevents page faults in ZC path.
Ring Type: AF_XDP rings are Single-Producer Single-Consumer (SPSC) lockless queues.

Performance:
Context Switch: 0 (if using Polled Mode / Busy Poll).
Cache Efficiency: Descriptors fit within 64B cache lines.
